skills.name: safeai-deploy
skills.description: Full SafeAI deployment automation — init, intelligence auto-config, and agent binding (Claude Code, Cursor, MCP). Includes local observability server.

skills.name: langchain-adapter
skills.description: LangChain tool wrapping adapter — enforces SafeAI input/output/action boundaries on all LangChain tools and chains. Includes a ready-to-use baseline policy template.

skills.name: prompt-injection-shield
skills.description: Detects and blocks prompt injection attacks — instruction overrides, role jailbreaks, system prompt extraction, indirect injection via tool output, and delimiter confusion.

skills.name: secrets-detector
skills.description: Extended secrets and credentials detector — 40+ patterns covering Anthropic, GitHub, Slack, Stripe, Twilio, JWT, GCP, Azure, SSH keys, DB connection strings, and more.

skills.name: healthcare-policies
skills.description: HIPAA-aligned policy set — blocks PHI (SSN, DOB, names, addresses) at all three boundaries and requires approval for clinical tool calls.

skills.name: finance-policies
skills.description: PCI-DSS aligned policy set — blocks PANs, CVVs, routing/account numbers and requires approval for payment tool calls (charge, refund, store-card).

skills.name: gdpr-policies
skills.description: GDPR-aligned policy set — redacts PII from all outputs, blocks unconsented personal data on input, and requires approval for data transfers, deletions, and exports.

skills.name: crewai-adapter
skills.description: CrewAI agent safety wrapper — intercepts tool calls and messages between CrewAI agents.

skills.name: autogen-adapter
skills.description: AutoGen multi-agent safety layer — intercepts group chat messages and tool calls.

skills.name: soc2-policies
skills.description: SOC 2 compliance policy set — access controls, data handling, and audit trail enforcement.
